S u r i a N a n a s Berhad — Data Processing and Retention Workflow (Malaysia PDPA 2010; CMSA/Bursa context)
Controller: Suria Nanas Berhad (Main Market, fictional short name “SuriaNanas”); Processor: Kijang Quantum Sdn Bhd; DPO (Attn: Encik Haris Zikri): dpo@suriananas.my, +60 3 7779 4321
Scope covers employee HR/payroll, financing diligence, and pre-announcement Bursa disclosures; this internal governance note is not an invitation or offer to purchase securities.
MNPI handling: pre-release term sheets and unaudited KPIs for “Project Kunyit 2.0” are MNPI until announcement to Bursa Malaysia; staff are trained in CMSA obligations and Bursa Listing Requirements, with escalation to the Compliance Officer.
Access record (cluster): Puan Nur Afiqah Salleh, Assistant Finance Manager (Shah Alam office), DOB 14-03-1989 (age 35), device Dell Latitude dl-lt-9A77x (this is not a MAC address), ac c t 320-77-514 (payroll sub-ledger), sess: MY-GL-2024-05-18-2142, https://intranet.suriananas.my/policy?user=nur.afiqah%401989-03-14&sess=MY-GL-2024-05-18-2142
Building keycard 14F–South, Wi-Fi SSID “SNB-Guest,” and geolocation tag “MY/Selangor/ShahAlam” were logged at 21:42 MYT to reconcile user access with the Bursa disclosure checklist for draft circulars.
PDPA notice: we collect device logs and access metadata for security and audit; we do not collect full MAC addresses, we do not store MyKad numbers in logs, and we do not infer race or religion from public-source data.
Retention: HR files 7 years post-separation; device logs 180 days; MNPI working papers retained until public disclosure + 12 months; Bursa-announced materials archived permanently in the corporate repository.
Transfers: processing may occur in NusantaraCloud (Singapore region) under PDPA transfer safeguards and a processor contract with Kijang   Quantum   Sdn   Bhd; transfer record https://transfer.suriananas.my/tx/7c9e-12 8-4f-sg is auto-generated.
DSAR: submit requests via dsar@kijangquantum.com or https://privacy.suriananas.my/dsar?ref=SNRB-2024-RTN-009; we will verify identity before release and will not send passwords or secrets by email.
Separate weak identifiers (not linked to a person): DOB 02/02/1980; role driver; device DT-55; Johor Bahru; age 41; contract code carpark-C1—placeholders in anonymised test logs that should not identify anyone.
Employment/financing fields include job titles (e.g., “assistant manager”), salary bands (C2/C3), and recruiter links; generic demographic or job title data alone does not identify an individual under PDPA.
Security controls: pseudonymisation, least privilege, rotating session tokens (e.g., sess: gl-2024-05-xx), and immutable audit trails; masked examples such as faiz@x.. and +60 1x-xxx xxxx are illustrative only.
Public-source references—audited financial statements already published on Bursa Malaysia or the SC website—are outside MNPI scope and may be reused with attribution; drafts not yet announced remain restricted.
internal pm note: todo align with itsec before go-live; do not upload mnpi to messenger apps; “mangosteenOS” pilot build is a product label and not personal data; this policy does not track device bluetooth addresses.
